summary: Large lb_00F9 decomp/matching PR with supporting type and prototype recovery. The PR primarily adds implementations and partial implementations in src/melee/lb/lb_00F9.c, refines lb/types.h dynamics-related layouts, updates lbvector's Euler-matrix parameter type, and changes fighter/stage call sites from the removed ft_unk union arm to lb_unk0. Bot report records 7 new lb_00F9 matches and 11 unmatched-item improvements.

key_files.role: Primary decomp/matching work; adds many includes, local lb_Collider and lb_803B7280 data, implements lb_8000FA94, lb_8000FD48, lb_8001044C excerpt, and many additional lb_00F9 functions in truncated diff.
evidence_refs: diff: lb_00F9.c include additions and lb_Collider/lb_803B7280
bot_report: lb_00F9 new matches and improvements

key_files.role: Recovered/refined structs and union arms used by lb_00F9 dynamics data, including lb_00F9_UnkDesc0, lb_00F9_UnkDesc1Inner, DynamicsData, lb_804D63A0_t, and lb_804D63A8_t.
evidence_refs: diff: lb_00F9_UnkDesc0 changed from raw scalar fields to HSD_JObj, Quaternion, Vec3, and f32 fields
diff: DynamicsData size changed 0x94 to 0x98 with unk_94
diff: lb_804D63A0_t and lb_804D63A8_t entries arrays

key_files.role: Header prototype cleanup for recovered lb_00F9 functions.
evidence_refs: diff: lb_800122F0 UNK_RET/UNK_PARAMS replaced with void lb_800122F0(HSD_ImageDesc*, GXTexObj*, f32)
diff: lb_800138EC UNK_RET/UNK_PARAMS replaced with typed render/projection parameters

key_files.role: Static declaration updates for lb_00F9 data symbols.
evidence_refs: diff: added static GXColor lb_804D3768 and lb_804D376C

key_files.role: Adjusted fighter dynamics call sites to use PolymorphicDesc.lb_unk0 instead of removed ft_unk.
Adjusted ground/castle call site to use PolymorphicDesc.lb_unk0 instead of removed ft_unk.
Changed lbVector_CreateEulerMatrix implementation parameter type from Vec3* to Quaternion*.
evidence_refs: diff: lbVector_CreateEulerMatrix(Mtx m, Vec3* angles) to Quaternion* angles

key_files.role: Updated public prototype for lbVector_CreateEulerMatrix to match implementation type change.
evidence_refs: diff: lbVector_CreateEulerMatrix prototype changed from Vec3* to Quaternion*

what_changed: Replaced placeholder markers with C bodies for lb_8000FA94 and lb_8000FD48 in the loaded diff, and added a large lb_8001044C implementation excerpt involving dynamics chains, matrices, vector normalization, gravity/force effects, collision checks, and floor checks.
Added lb_00F9 dependencies for math_ppc, stdarg, MSL trig functions, GX subsystem headers, lb collision/command headers, baselib GObj helpers, quatlib, state, TEV, and mplib.
Introduced a local lb_Collider struct with radius and position fields and a const lb_803B7280 vector table initialized with downward vectors.

Recovered dynamics data layouts in lb/types.h: lb_00F9_UnkDesc0 now uses HSD_JObj*, Quaternion, Vec3, and f32/s32 fields; DynamicsData gained unk_94 and size 0x98; pool wrapper structs now expose entries arrays.
Removed the ftDynamics_UnkDesc union arm and updated observed users in ftdynamics.c and grcastle.c to access desc.lb_unk0.jobj.
Updated lb_00F9.h prototypes for lb_800122F0 and lb_800138EC from unknown signatures to typed declarations.
Changed lbVector_CreateEulerMatrix to accept Quaternion* in both lbvector.c and lbvector.h.

Bot report recorded +3012 matched-code bytes, 7 new matches in main/melee/lb/lb_00F9, and 11 improvements including lb_8001044C to 81.26%, lb_80012994 to 99.57%, lb_8000FD48 to 93.66%, and lb_8000FA94 to 95.75%.

smart_moves.text: The PR updates external fighter and ground users immediately after removing the ft_unk union arm, avoiding stale typed access paths.
Prototype and implementation surfaces were kept synchronized for lbVector_CreateEulerMatrix by changing both lbvector.c and lbvector.h to Quaternion*.
The PR replaced broad padding in pool structs with entries arrays, making lb_8000FA94 free-list initialization expressible with typed fields.

decomp_lessons.lesson: When a recovered union arm is library-owned rather than subsystem-specific, update all observed call sites to the shared lb-prefixed arm instead of keeping a misleading subsystem arm.
evidence_refs: diff: fighter and ground call sites changed to desc.lb_unk0.jobj

decomp_lessons.lesson: Typed pool wrapper structs can clarify allocator/free-list setup: lb_804D63A0_t and lb_804D63A8_t changed from raw padding to entries arrays, and lb_8000FA94 then initializes entries and next pointers directly.
evidence_refs: diff: lb_8000FA94 loops over entries and sets next pointers

decomp_lessons.lesson: When a recovered body proves a function signature, update the owning header rather than leaving UNK_RET/UNK_PARAMS.

naming_conventions.name: lb_unk0
naming_conventions.convention: Use an lb-prefixed union arm for recovered lb_00F9 dynamics descriptor data rather than the removed ft_unk arm.
evidence_refs: diff: union PolymorphicDesc has struct lb_00F9_UnkDesc0 lb_unk0
diff: ftdynamics.c and grcastle.c use desc.lb_unk0

naming_conventions.name: unk_<offset>
naming_conventions.convention: Recovered struct fields retain offset-style unknown names where semantics are not proven, while types are improved to HSD_JObj, Quaternion, Vec3, f32, or s32.
evidence_refs: diff: lb_00F9_UnkDesc0 fields unk_2C, unk_38, unk_58, unk_68, unk_6C, unk_78, unk_88, unk_8C

naming_conventions.name: fn_80013614
naming_conventions.convention: Address-style function naming remains in use for a symbol reported by the bot where no semantic name is supplied by PR evidence.

assembly_or_matching_tactics.tactic: PAD_STACK was used narrowly in recovered lb_00F9 code, including PAD_STACK(0x20) in lb_8000FD48 and PAD_STACK(8) near a GX drawing return in the loaded diff.
evidence_refs: diff: later lb_00F9 excerpt contains PAD_STACK(8)
bot_report: lb_8000FD48 improved to 93.66%, not fully matched
assembly_or_matching_tactics.caution: The loaded evidence does not explain why PAD_STACK was necessary; standards require verifier evidence before treating stack padding as reviewable style.

assembly_or_matching_tactics.tactic: The lb_8001044C excerpt uses explicit s32 casts around Fighter_Part/count comparisons and a skip-by-8 traversal before a remainder loop, suggesting shape-sensitive control flow for matching.
evidence_refs: diff: lb_8001044C casts part to s32 and checks part > 0xFF
diff: lb_8001044C skip_count/rem8/n loop advances cur by eight next links
assembly_or_matching_tactics.caution: Because lb_8001044C remains an improvement rather than a reported new match, do not generalize the unrolled skip-by-8 shape as accepted source style without further evidence.

assembly_or_matching_tactics.tactic: Type recovery was used as a matching aid: raw/padded data descriptions were replaced with Quaternion, Vec3, HSD_JObj, entries arrays, and typed prototypes.
evidence_refs: diff: lb_800122F0 and lb_800138EC typed prototypes
assembly_or_matching_tactics.caution: Field semantics mostly remain unknown; the evidence supports type/shape recovery more strongly than semantic naming.

review_feedback.author: decomp-dev[bot]
review_feedback.text: Bot report for GALE01 recorded matched code 62.41% (+0.08%, +3012 bytes), 7 new matches, and 11 improvements in unmatched items for main/melee/lb/lb_00F9.

follow_up_queries: lb_800122F0 lb_800138EC UNK_RET UNK_PARAMS prototype recovery

evidence_refs: metadata_json: PR identity, merged state, changed files, counts
changed_files.jsonl: 8 changed files and line counts
raw_diff: loaded/truncated diff excerpt plus targeted local diff reads for headers/types
notes: PR body contains no technical explanation beyond 'Tracking PR as usual'.
There are no loaded human review comments and no review records in metadata.
The raw diff is truncated in the loaded packet; targeted local reads were used only for exact header/type changes.
Bot report supports progress and new-match claims, but not author intent or the necessity of specific matching tactics such as PAD_STACK.
Several functions and additional lb_00F9 hunks are only represented through bot report summaries or truncated diff context, so lessons are limited to directly visible changes.

accepted_candidate_records.title: Replace misleading subsystem union arms with recovered shared library union arms
accepted_candidate_records.text: PR #2393 removed PolymorphicDesc.ft_unk and updated ftdynamics.c and grcastle.c users to desc.lb_unk0.jobj, indicating the recovered dynamics descriptor data belongs under the lb_00F9/lb union arm rather than a fighter-specific arm.
evidence_refs: diff: ftdynamics.c and grcastle.c access desc.lb_unk0.jobj

accepted_candidate_records.title: Typed pool arrays clarify lb_00F9 free-list initialization
accepted_candidate_records.text: PR #2393 changed lb_804D63A0_t and lb_804D63A8_t from opaque padding to entries arrays, and lb_8000FA94 then initializes each entry and next pointer directly. This is a concrete example of type recovery replacing raw storage in allocator/free-list setup.
evidence_refs: diff: lb_8000FA94 initializes entries and next links

source_update_candidates.title: src/melee/lb/lb_00F9.c owns recovered lb dynamics descriptor/free-list implementation
source_update_candidates.text: PR #2393 evidence ties lb_00F9.c to DynamicsData/DynamicsDesc initialization and update logic, including lb_8000FA94 free-list setup, lb_8000FD48 dynamics chain construction, and lb_8001044C dynamics update/collision logic excerpt.
source_update_candidates.reason: Potentially useful path ownership/search fact, but should be curated against current source before promotion.

source_update_candidates.title: lbVector_CreateEulerMatrix parameter typed as Quaternion pointer in this PR
source_update_candidates.text: PR #2393 changes lbVector_CreateEulerMatrix(Mtx m, Vec3* angles) to lbVector_CreateEulerMatrix(Mtx m, Quaternion* angles) in both src/melee/lb/lbvector.c and src/melee/lb/lbvector.h.
source_update_candidates.reason: Candidate path/API fact; verify against current source before adding to source-owned facts.

source_update_candidates.title: Caution: PAD_STACK in partially matched functions should not become style by precedent
source_update_candidates.text: PR #2393 contains PAD_STACK in lb_8000FD48 while the bot report lists lb_8000FD48 as an improvement to 93.66%, not a new full match. This supports reinforcing that stack-padding tactics need narrow verifier evidence and should not be generalized from partial improvements.
source_update_candidates.reason: Possible supporting example for existing standard; not a new accepted standard from this PR alone.

rejection_notes: Do not infer human reviewer approval rationale; no human review comments were loaded.
Do not claim all added lb_00F9 functions fully matched; bot report distinguishes 7 new matches from 11 partial improvements.
Do not promote PAD_STACK or skip-by-8 traversal as accepted style from this PR alone; loaded evidence lacks explicit tactic justification.
Do not infer semantic meanings for unk_2C, unk_38, unk_58, unk_88, or similar fields; PR evidence keeps offset-style names.
